title: Device Home Screen - Charge Case battery charging icon
scenario: Charge case battery icon does not show or hide charging sign when charger is plugged/unplugged on Device Home Screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your phone.
2. Navigate to the Home screen where the connected device is displayed.
3. Open the charge case with the earbuds inside (no charger plugged in).
4. Observe the battery icon for the charge case on the Home screen.
5. Plug a charger into the charge case.
6. Observe the battery icon for the charge case on the Home screen.
7. Unplug the charger from the charge case.
8. Observe the battery icon for the charge case on the Home screen.
expected: Step 4: The charge case battery icon shows no charging sign. Step 6: The charge case battery icon displays a charging sign (e.g., a lightning bolt or similar indicator). Step 8: The charging sign disappears from the charge case battery icon.
